    default void
    KafkaListenerContainerCustomizer.configure(org.springframework.kafka.listener.AbstractMessageListenerContainer<?,?> container, String destinationName, String group, ExtendedConsumerProperties<KafkaConsumerProperties> extendedConsumerProperties)
    Configure the Kafka listener container with access to extended consumer properties.
    default void
    ListenerContainerWithDlqAndRetryCustomizer.configure(org.springframework.kafka.listener.AbstractMessageListenerContainer<?,?> container, String destinationName, String group, BiFunction<org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerRecord<?,?>, Exception, org.apache.kafka.common.TopicPartition> dlqDestinationResolver, org.springframework.util.backoff.BackOff backOff, ExtendedConsumerProperties<KafkaConsumerProperties> extendedConsumerProperties)
    API method for configuring the container that also gives access to the ExtendedConsumerProperties for the binding.

    KafkaMessageChannelBinder.createPolledConsumerResources(String name, String group, ConsumerDestination destination, ExtendedConsumerProperties<KafkaConsumerProperties> extendedConsumerProperties)
